target_id.description: Id of the note this suggestion is about.

kind.description: What kind of improvement is proposed.

proposed_patch.description: Proposed field changes (e.g. title/tags/payload.*) to apply via notes_patch. A PROPOSAL only — never applied automatically by the server.

proposed_links.description: Links the curator proposes adding (apply via notes_link after review).

rel.description: Active-voice lower_snake_case relation, e.g. relates_to, supersedes.

evidence_ids.description: Note/artifact ids that justify the suggestion.

rationale.description: Why this change improves the memory.

status.description: Review state: 'open' until a human/agent applies or rejects it. The server never auto-applies.

proposed_by.description: The curator agent that proposed this suggestion.
